page.content: In Table 1, the header "Neutralizing antibody positive* / Total (%)" is associated with age groups under the header "Age (year)" which includes categories: "<29", "30-39", "40-49", "50-59", "60<", and "Total". The row labeled "Total" shows 4/32 (13) for <29, 0/33 (0) for 30-39, 10/39 (26) for 40-49, 23/92 (25) for 50-59, 11/92 (18) for 60<, and 48/257 (19) for Total. The row "History of seasonal influenza vaccination within the previous 12 months" is divided into "Yes" and "No". For "Yes", the values are 4/9 (44) for <29, 0/6 (0) for 30-39, 4/10 (40) for 40-49, 10/27 (37) for 50-59, 5/19 (26) for 60<, and 23/71 (32) for Total.

page.content: At 24 hrs, the values are 1.47 (0.66)* for periportal and 0.47 (0.32)§ for pericentral. At 72 hrs, the values are 2.18 (0.91)* for periportal and 0.84 (0.65)§ for pericentral. At 168 hrs, the values are 2.28 (0.88)* for periportal and 0.79 (0.55)§ for pericentral. Finally, at 240 hrs, the values are 0.09 (0.05) for periportal and 0.07 (0.05) for pericentral.
